root_cause: Deployment attempted with incompatible package version.
evidence_lines: deploy	setup	2023-10-01T10:00:31Z ERROR: Version mismatch detected! Expected version 2.0.0 but found 1.8.0.
deploy	setup	2023-10-01T10:00:32Z Deployment failed due to version mismatch.
remediation_steps: Update the package to the expected version 2.0.0.
Verify the version in the deployment configuration.
